text: allow moving aims across parent phase boundries

status.comment: Not a duplicate of b3f8518f (that one moves phases; this moves aims). Implemented in moveAimDownAction/moveAimUpAction (move-actions.ts): at a phase boundary it uses the flattened getActualPhasesForColumn(col) which spans all parents, so an aim at the last phase of parent A moves into the first phase of parent B's children. Verified by code reading; keyboard-actions spec green.
